Home/Industries

Industries

Technology infrastructure services for teams that operate, manage, and improve professional environments.

Opticable supports business sites, managed properties, and project teams that want modern systems without losing clarity or reliability.

Request a quoteServices

Industries

Properties, portfolios, and project teams each need a different technology approach.

We adapt security, wireless, cabling, and network work to occupied buildings, shared areas, tenant turnover, active operations, and project realities.

Industries

Technology infrastructure services for teams that operate, manage, and improve professional environments.

Opticable supports business sites, managed properties, and project teams that want modern systems without losing clarity or reliability.

Businesses and offices

Connected workspaces with structured cabling, WiFi, IT systems, and practical operational support.

Commercial properties

Infrastructure that supports occupants, building operations, and secure day-to-day activity.

Multi-unit and mixed-use sites

Shared-area networks, secure entry, surveillance, and communication systems for modern properties.

Property managers

Repeatable standards, cleaner support, and easier technology coordination across active portfolios.

Developers and contractors

Technology planning and delivery that fits construction, fit-out, and phased project realities.

Industrial and logistics sites

Reliable connectivity, secure access, and infrastructure that supports operational environments.

Case studies

Case studies — How we approach different project types

These representative project scenarios show how we approach different building types and operating conditions. Every site is different, but the examples reflect how we scope and coordinate systems in the field.

Office building

Office building with MikroTik routing, Omada WiFi and switching, and a UniFi management stack for cameras and access.

View case study

Multi-tenant building

Multi-tenant residential property with UniFi Access, UniFi cameras, and Omada WiFi in common areas.

View case study

Retail and sales floor

Retail space with a unified UniFi security platform, Omada WiFi, and MikroTik routing.

View case study

Construction site

Construction project coordinated in phases around MikroTik routing, Omada switching, and a unified UniFi security stack.

View case study

Coverage area

Serving clients across Quebec.

Opticable serves commercial properties, managed buildings, multi-unit sites, and project teams across Quebec, including Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, the South Shore, the North Shore, the Laurentians, Lanaudiere, Monteregie, Quebec City, and surrounding regions.

MontrealLavalLongueuilSouth ShoreNorth ShoreLaurentiansLanaudiereMonteregieQuebec CityAnd more

Project Intake

Need a technology specialist for cameras, secure entry, WiFi, or building communications?

Send a quote request with the property type, required systems, and target timeline.

Request a quoteView all services

Opticable serves businesses and managed properties across Quebec, including Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, the South Shore, the North Shore, and the Laurentians.
